task_completion.description: Extract and save the wild-type human HBB sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'wt_hbb.fasta' is visible in a text editor, file manager, or sequence viewer, containing the sequence starting with 'MVHLTPEEKS'.

task_completion.description: Create and save the Sickle Cell variant sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'sickle_hbb.fasta' is visible, containing the mutated sequence starting with 'MVHLTPVEKS' (showing the E to V mutation at position 7).

task_completion.description: Document the Molecular Weight (MW) and Isoelectric Point (pI) for both variants in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text file named 'charge_analysis_report.txt' is open, displaying the calculated MW (approx 15,998 Da / 16.0 kDa for WT and 15,968 Da / 16.0 kDa for Sickle) and pI (approx 6.74 for WT and 7.13 for Sickle) for both sequences.

task_completion.description: Specify which variant has a higher pI in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'charge_analysis_report.txt' file explicitly states that the Sickle Cell variant has a higher (more basic) pI than the Wild-Type variant.

task_completion.description: Specify which variant migrates faster toward the anode at pH 8.6.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'charge_analysis_report.txt' file explicitly states that the Wild-Type (WT) variant would migrate faster toward the anode (positive electrode) during gel electrophoresis at pH 8.6.

integrity.description: The agent used a bioinformatics tool (like UGENE) or a script to calculate the MW and pI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a sequence analysis tool's interface or running a script in the terminal to compute the properties, rather than just typing the final answers from memory.

integrity.description: The agent saved the output files in the correct requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths for 'wt_hbb.fasta', 'sickle_hbb.fasta', and 'charge_analysis_report.txt' are clearly shown to be in '~/UGENE_Data/results/'.

integrity.description: The agent actively performed the E7V mutation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent editing the sequence in a text editor or sequence editor to change the 'E' to a 'V' at the 7th position, rather than downloading a pre-existing sickle cell fasta file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: WT Sequence starts with: MVHLTPEEKS... (147 amino acids). Sickle Sequence starts with: MVHLTPVEKS... (E7V mutation). WT MW: ~15,998 Da (16.0 kDa), pI: ~6.74. Sickle MW: ~15,968 Da (16.0 kDa), pI: ~7.13. Higher pI: Sickle variant. Faster migration to anode at pH 8.6: Wild-Type (WT) variant.
